storyCollection.title: Primary Advantage B2 Preliminary Story Library

stories.title: The Club That Needed a Voice
stories.description: A student joins a school club and must decide how to express an unpopular but thoughtful opinion.

stories.title: The Name on the Poster
stories.description: A poster mistake makes a child reflect on identity, recognition, and speaking up respectfully.

stories.title: The Two Homes Project
stories.description: A student with two family homes creates a project that helps classmates understand different family structures.

stories.title: The Accent Question
stories.description: A new student feels embarrassed by an accent until classmates learn how language connects to personal history.

stories.title: The Team Uniform Debate
stories.description: A debate about team uniforms becomes a story about belonging, comfort, and group identity.

stories.title: The Hidden Sketchbook
stories.description: A student hides a sketchbook before learning that personal interests can become bridges to friendship.

stories.title: The Family Story Presentation
stories.description: A class presentation about family history helps a child understand pride and privacy.

stories.title: The New Role in the Group
stories.description: A student who is usually the helper must learn to become the decision-maker during a difficult project.

stories.title: The Quiet Table
stories.description: A quiet lunch table becomes a place where several students slowly build a sense of belonging.

stories.title: The Festival Clothes Choice
stories.description: A child chooses what to wear for a school festival and learns to balance tradition and confidence.

stories.title: The Friend Who Changed Groups
stories.description: A friendship changes when one student joins a different group, forcing both children to reconsider loyalty.

stories.title: The Message Taken Wrong
stories.description: A short online message creates a misunderstanding that friends must repair face to face.

stories.title: The Competition Between Friends
stories.description: Two close friends compete for the same award and learn how ambition can strain kindness.

stories.title: The Secret-Keeper Problem
stories.description: A student is trusted with a secret and must decide when silence stops being helpful.

stories.title: The Unequal Partnership
stories.description: A group project reveals that one student is doing too much work while another is avoiding responsibility.

stories.title: The Birthday Nobody Planned
stories.description: A forgotten birthday forces a group of friends to think about attention, apology, and repair.

stories.title: The Rumor in the Hallway
stories.description: Students respond to a rumor and learn how quickly careless words can change relationships.

stories.title: The Old Friend and the New Friend
stories.description: A child struggles to balance an old friendship with a new one without making either person feel replaced.

stories.title: The Honest Feedback
stories.description: A student must give honest feedback on a friend's performance without damaging the friendship.

stories.title: The Group Chat Choice
stories.description: A group chat problem teaches students about digital responsibility and including people fairly.

stories.title: The Trail Closed Sign
stories.description: Friends face a choice when a shortcut is closed and learn why rules often have hidden reasons.

stories.title: The Storm on the Ridge
stories.description: A hiking group must change its plan quickly when a storm approaches during an outdoor challenge.

stories.title: The Kayak Drift
stories.description: A kayaking lesson becomes serious when students drift from the group and must use safety training.

stories.title: The Abandoned Station
stories.description: Students explore an old station for a history project and discover why curiosity needs boundaries.

stories.title: The Cave Echo Decision
stories.description: A cave visit tests a group's patience when sound and fear make communication difficult.

stories.title: The Broken Bridge Route
stories.description: A damaged footbridge forces children to choose between turning back or finding a safer route.

stories.title: The Night Walk Challenge
stories.description: A supervised night walk teaches students how fear changes perception and why calm observation matters.

stories.title: The Island Tide Lesson
stories.description: A beach exploration changes when the tide rises faster than expected.

stories.title: The Mountain Rescue Drill
stories.description: A practice rescue drill becomes a lesson in leadership, trust, and following instructions.

stories.title: The Lost Research Notebook
stories.description: A field trip notebook goes missing, threatening a project and forcing the group to retrace its choices.

stories.title: The Answer Sheet Temptation
stories.description: A student finds an answer sheet before a test and must choose between advantage and integrity.

stories.title: The Prize That Felt Unfair
stories.description: A contest result seems unfair, and students must decide how to question it respectfully.

stories.title: The Borrowed Idea
stories.description: A creative idea is used without credit, forcing classmates to talk about ownership and respect.

stories.title: The Captain's Hard Choice
stories.description: A team captain must choose players fairly while managing pressure from close friends.

stories.title: The Fundraising Mistake
stories.description: A fundraising total is counted incorrectly, and students must decide whether to correct a helpful error.

stories.title: The Rule Everyone Ignores
stories.description: A small ignored rule creates a larger problem, teaching students why shared rules matter.

stories.title: The Apology After Winning
stories.description: A student wins but behaves badly, then learns that success does not excuse unkindness.

stories.title: The Teacher's Trust
stories.description: A class earns extra freedom and must decide how to respond when someone misuses it.

stories.title: The Shared Credit Debate
stories.description: A group must decide how to share credit when one member had the original idea but others improved it.

stories.title: The Photo Permission Problem
stories.description: A student posts a photo without asking and learns why permission matters even among friends.

stories.title: The Plastic-Free Week
stories.description: A school tries a plastic-free week and students discover both the difficulty and value of changing habits.

stories.title: The River Testing Project
stories.description: Students test water from a local river and must explain their findings to the community.

stories.title: The Trees Marked for Cutting
stories.description: Children learn that some trees may be removed and organize a thoughtful response with facts and respect.

stories.title: The Community Garden Argument
stories.description: A garden project divides neighbors until students help find a plan that serves different needs.

stories.title: The Wildlife Crossing Plan
stories.description: A class designs a simple wildlife crossing idea and learns how roads affect animals.

stories.title: The Cafeteria Waste Audit
stories.description: Students measure food waste at school and face uncomfortable facts about daily choices.

stories.title: The Polluted Pond Report
stories.description: A pond project teaches students how evidence can turn concern into practical action.

stories.title: The Solar Panel Proposal
stories.description: A student council considers solar panels and learns to compare cost, benefit, and long-term impact.

stories.title: The Quiet Park Campaign
stories.description: Children campaign for quieter park behavior after learning how noise affects people and animals.

stories.title: The Repair Cafe Day
stories.description: A community repair event teaches students that fixing objects can reduce waste and build skills.

stories.title: The AI Homework Helper
stories.description: A student uses a digital tool for homework and learns the difference between help and dishonesty.

stories.title: The Phone-Free Challenge
stories.description: A class tries a phone-free challenge and reflects on attention, boredom, and real conversation.

stories.title: The Online Game Team
stories.description: An online team game creates conflict around cooperation, tone, and fair play.

stories.title: The Drone Video Plan
stories.description: Students plan a drone video and learn about privacy, permission, and safety rules.

stories.title: The Broken Class Website
stories.description: A class website breaks before a presentation, requiring students to troubleshoot under pressure.

stories.title: The Algorithm Surprise
stories.description: A student notices repeated video recommendations and begins to question how online choices are shaped.

stories.title: The Digital Time Capsule
stories.description: A class creates a digital time capsule and discusses what memories should be shared publicly.

stories.title: The Robot Helper Debate
stories.description: Students debate whether a robot helper should replace or support human jobs in school.

stories.title: The Edited Photo
stories.description: An edited photo causes confusion and teaches students how images can change truth.

stories.title: The Password Problem
stories.description: A shared password creates trouble and students learn why personal information must be protected.

stories.title: The Festival Exchange
stories.description: Students compare two festivals and learn how traditions can be different while sharing similar values.

stories.title: The Translation Mistake
stories.description: A translation mistake creates confusion during a school event and teaches patience with language learning.

stories.title: The Lunch From Home
stories.description: A student feels shy about a traditional lunch before classmates learn about food and culture.

stories.title: The Museum Label
stories.description: A museum label makes students question whose stories are included in history.

stories.title: The Pen Pal Project
stories.description: Letters from another country help students notice assumptions they did not know they had.

stories.title: The Music Collaboration
stories.description: Students combine different musical styles and learn how creativity grows from listening.

stories.title: The Story From Two Sides
stories.description: A local legend is told in two versions, helping students understand perspective and memory.

stories.title: The Language Day Speech
stories.description: A language celebration teaches students about pride, nervousness, and respect for multilingual classmates.

stories.title: The Art From Recycled Objects
stories.description: An art project connects culture, environment, and personal expression through reused materials.

stories.title: The History Walk
stories.description: A guided walk through town helps students see familiar streets through older stories.

stories.title: The Reluctant Team Leader
stories.description: A student who avoids attention must lead a team when the usual leader is absent.

stories.title: The Debate Team Split
stories.description: A debate team divides over strategy and must rebuild trust before the final round.

stories.title: The Camp Schedule Crisis
stories.description: A camp schedule falls apart, forcing students to decide priorities under time pressure.

stories.title: The Orchestra Performance
stories.description: A school orchestra prepares for a performance and learns how individual practice affects the group.

stories.title: The Volunteer Roster
stories.description: A volunteer project fails when jobs are unclear, and students redesign the system fairly.

stories.title: The House Captain Problem
stories.description: A house captain must handle complaints from younger students and pressure from friends.

stories.title: The Emergency Drill
stories.description: An emergency drill reveals who stays calm and how leadership appears in small actions.

stories.title: The Robotics Team Deadline
stories.description: A robotics team faces a deadline and learns how planning prevents last-minute blame.

stories.title: The Community Interview Team
stories.description: Students interview community members and learn to share roles based on skill, confidence, and need.

stories.title: The Final Rehearsal
stories.description: A rehearsal goes badly, and a student leader must encourage honesty without discouraging the team.

stories.title: The Anonymous Suggestion Box
stories.description: A series of anonymous suggestions leads students to investigate what their classmates truly need.

stories.title: The Missing Memory Card
stories.description: A missing memory card threatens a class film project and forces careful, fair investigation.

stories.title: The Pattern in the Library
stories.description: Repeated book movements in the library reveal a hidden system created by a quiet student.

stories.title: The Locked Greenhouse
stories.description: A locked greenhouse mystery leads students to discover a problem with plant care and responsibility.

stories.title: The Changed Science Results
stories.description: A science experiment result changes overnight, and students must separate evidence from assumptions.

stories.title: The Old School Photograph
stories.description: An old photograph reveals a forgotten story about the school and its past students.

stories.title: The Vanishing Stage Props
stories.description: Theater props disappear before a performance, creating a mystery about organization and trust.

stories.title: The Unsent Letter
stories.description: An unsent letter found in a book prompts students to learn about privacy and empathy.

stories.title: The Map With Two Dates
stories.description: A map with two dates leads students to compare past and present versions of their town.

stories.title: The Silent Bell
stories.description: A school bell stops working at important moments, and students investigate a practical but surprising cause.

stories.title: The Speech Without Notes
stories.description: A student prepares to give a speech without notes and learns how confidence grows through structure.

stories.title: The Long-Distance Race
stories.description: A runner trains for a difficult race and learns to understand effort, limits, and recovery.

stories.title: The Audition Decision
stories.description: A child decides whether to audition again after failing once and learns what persistence really means.

stories.title: The Difficult Conversation
stories.description: A student must have a difficult conversation with a friend instead of avoiding the problem.

stories.title: The Fear of Deep Water
stories.description: Swimming lessons help a student face fear gradually with support and realistic goals.

stories.title: The Exam Pressure Plan
stories.description: A student under exam pressure learns how planning and rest can work together.

stories.title: The First Solo Trip
stories.description: A first short solo trip across town teaches a child independence and careful attention.

stories.title: The Art Competition Loss
stories.description: A student loses an art competition and learns to value feedback without losing motivation.

stories.title: The Promise to Practice
stories.description: A music student makes a practice promise and learns why consistency matters more than last-minute effort.

stories.title: The Day Everything Changed
stories.description: An unexpected family change challenges a child to adapt while still asking for support.
